member.name: T:FeeComponents
member.summary: Utility class used internally by the sdk.

member.name: M:FeeComponents.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a fee component object from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:FeeComponents.FromProtobuf(Proto.FeeComponents)
member.summary: Create a fee components object from a protobuf.

member.name: P:FeeComponents.Min
member.summary: A minimum, the calculated fee must be greater than this value

member.name: P:FeeComponents.Max
member.summary: A maximum, the calculated fee must be less than this value

member.name: P:FeeComponents.Constant
member.summary: A constant contribution to the fee

member.name: P:FeeComponents.TransactionBandwidthByte
member.summary: The price of bandwidth consumed by a transaction, measured in bytes

member.name: P:FeeComponents.TransactionVerification
member.summary: The price per signature verification for a transaction

member.name: P:FeeComponents.TransactionRamByteHour
member.summary: The price of RAM consumed by a transaction, measured in byte-hours

member.name: P:FeeComponents.TransactionStorageByteHour
member.summary: The price of storage consumed by a transaction, measured in byte-hours

member.name: P:FeeComponents.ContractTransactionGas
member.summary: The price of computation for a smart contract transaction, measured in gas

member.name: P:FeeComponents.TransferVolumeHbar
member.summary: The price per hbar transferred for a transfer

member.name: P:FeeComponents.ResponseMemoryByte
member.summary: The price of bandwidth for data retrieved from memory for a response, measured in bytes

member.name: P:FeeComponents.ResponseDiskByte
member.summary: The price of bandwidth for data retrieved from disk for a response, measured in bytes

member.name: M:FeeComponents.ToProtobuf
member.summary: Convert fee component object to protobuf.

member.name: M:FeeComponents.ToBytes
member.summary: Convert fee component object to byte array.
